bookings.specialRequests: Clean corporate comedy only. No politics.

chat.body: We need a 45-minute clean set for a senior corporate audience.
Happy to do that. My quote includes show prep and travel.

reviews.comment: Beautiful audience connection and a very polished premium set.
Sharp, clean, and perfectly paced for our corporate audience.
